name: nightly-export-guard

goal.end_state: nightly export file validates against schema AND row_count > 0
goal.evidence: schema validator exits 0 and reported row_count > 0
goal.budget: at most 3 export attempts per night

iteration: read last-run timestamp and this-run attempt log from disk
validate output against schema and check row count
if invalid, read the validation error and retry with the documented fix (different fix than last attempt)
on_stop: if still failing, page on-call with the exact validation error; do NOT mark the run successful
